_meta.note: 21st major-arc enrichment dip; 3rd of the A-roundup campaign (Matt S154). The Kingsmoot/Euron arc was unusual: it already had a spine (S116) + one early enrichment (S116) + a Victarion-voyage wire (S132). Baseline dedup pull = 230 internal edges but only 11 internal CAUSAL — a thin causal spine + a dense dyadic web. WIRE+ENRICH with a HEAVY dedup. **0 NEW NODES** — every target already exists (cragorn, dunstan-drumm, red-rain, all shield-lords, gylbert-farwynd, torwold-browntooth, victarion-greyjoys-third-wife, naggas-hill, silence, iron-victory, dragonbinder, eurons-mongrel-sons, burning-of-the-lannister-fleet) — so this dip is pure edge-wiring that LIGHTS islanded nodes. 37 edges. MARQUEE value: (a) the taking-of-the-shields hub had ZERO participant roles (only 2 CAUSES) -> wired Victarion AGENT_IN/COMMANDS_IN + Euron COMMANDS_IN (ordered, not present) + the de-island of victarion-slays-multiple-defenders SUB_BEAT_OF + LOCATED_AT shield-islands + 4 combatants + the 4 shield-lords Euron APPOINTS; (b) the kingsmoot fully participated -> LOCATED_AT naggas-hill, aeron OFFICIATES (distinct from his AGENT_IN), dragonbinder WIELDED_IN + cragorn AGENT_IN (the horn-blower the horn killed), the 3 additional claimants (Gylbert/Erik/Dunstan) + dunstan WIELDS red-rain (Valyrian steel), Asha's champions (Qarl/Tristifer) + Baelor Blacktyde PARTICIPATES_IN; (c) the Reader (rodrik-harlaw, core_in=0) -> UNCLE_OF asha (maternal, Alannys's brother), ADVISES (counsels her to abandon the moot), ALLIES_WITH (sent the summons in her name), PARTICIPATES_IN; (d) lit 0-edge marquee objects -> euron CAPTAIN_OF silence, victarion CAPTAIN_OF iron-victory, euron OWNS dragonbinder, eurons-mongrel-sons CREW_OF silence; (e) WHODUNIT done HONESTLY -> NO new SUSPECTED_OF (euron SUSPECTED_OF death-of-balon already built S116; Lens B declined a second mechanism the text leaves unproven); the agency value is euron MANIPULATES hotho-harlaw via_bribe (the named captain who filled his hands with gold then shouted for Euron - the type-correct form, NOT MANIPULATES->the-kingsmoot-event which is a type-misfit); (f) the salt-wife wound -> victarion KILLS victarion-greyjoys-third-wife ('made me do the killing'); (g) cross-arc backstory seam -> euron+victarion AGENT_IN burning-of-the-lannister-fleet (lit a 0-in Greyjoy-Rebellion event). DROPPED at synthesis: taking-of-the-shields CAUSES anarchy-in-the-reach (THE S116 TRAP - anarchy-in-the-reach is a bare pass2-wiki stub for the HISTORICAL Gardener-era Reach anarchy, NOT the AFFC raiding; the Reach-raiding consequence stays node-prose); dragonbinder GIFTED_TO victarion (the gift is an ADWD scene, out of AFFC scope; euron OWNS covers possession); euron ASSAULTS the salt-wife (seduction/rape ambiguous, over-assert -> node-prose); euron DECEIVES asha (asserts a lie unproven; the SUSPECTED_OF node covers it). THEORY-GATED (node-prose, NO edges): Euron<->Bloodraven, Dragonbinder=Horn-of-Joramun, the dusky-woman identity, Euron-as-eldritch-herald/Valyria-voyage. NO TWOW (Falia Flowers, The Forsaken). NO container tag (Iron-Islands not approved).

edges.quote: He vaulted over the gunwale
edges.note: Victarion personally boards and fights in the assault on the Shields (the Reaver chapter is his POV throughout the taking). The hub had ZERO participant roles before this dip.

edges.quote: The drums were pounding out a battle beat as the Iron Victory swept forward
edges.note: Victarion directs the fleet action from the Iron Victory while also personally fighting (AGENT_IN + COMMANDS_IN both warranted — he orders Nute, divides the fleet, times the assault).

edges.quote: Euron had sent Torwold Browntooth and the Red Oarsman up the Mander
edges.note: Euron devised and ordered the whole tactical plan (the decoy fleet up the Mander, the timed assault, the silenced beacon-towers) but was NOT personally present at the assault (Victarion bitterly notes Euron lazing in a castle) -> COMMANDS_IN (orderer), NOT AGENT_IN.

edges.quote: Greyshield, Greenshield, and Southshield fell before the sun came up
edges.note: victarion-slays-multiple-defenders was causally ISLANDED (cOut=0). The slaying happens during the assault on the Shields -> de-island it under the parent event.

edges.quote: Greyshield, Greenshield, and Southshield fell before the sun came up
edges.note: The taking is set entirely on the four Shield Islands; the event had no LOCATED_AT (shield-islands had 5 in / 0 out).

edges.quote: The Knight took Grimston by himself
edges.note: Ser Harras Harlaw (the Knight) takes Greyshield's seat Grimston single-handed in the assault; later rewarded Lord of Greyshield.

edges.quote: Nute the Barber send a throwing axe
edges.note: Nute fights alongside Victarion in the assault (throwing-axe kill); later rewarded Lord of Oakenshield.

edges.quote: Euron had sent Torwold Browntooth and the Red Oarsman up the Mander
edges.note: Torwold executes the decoy/diversion up the Mander that enables the main assault. Lights a 0-edge node.

edges.quote: He gave the captured ship to Ragnor Pyke
edges.note: Ragnor Pyke fights in the assault and is given a captured longship as his prize.

edges.quote: rise, Ser Harras Harlaw, Lord of Greyshield
edges.note: Euron formally installs the new shield-lords at the victory feast. (Harras HOLDS_TITLE lord-of-greyshield already exists; the APPOINTS act of granting it was unwired.)

edges.quote: Rise, Andrik the Unsmiling, Lord of Southshield
edges.note: Euron installs Andrik the Unsmiling as Lord of Southshield.

edges.quote: Rise, Maron Volmark, Lord of Greenshield
edges.note: Euron installs the boy Maron Volmark as Lord of Greenshield.

edges.quote: rise, Nute the Barber, Lord of Oakenshield
edges.note: Euron installs the lowborn Nute the Barber as Lord of Oakenshield.

edges.quote: four-and-forty monstrous stone ribs rose from the earth
edges.note: The kingsmoot is held on Nagga's hill under the ribs of Nagga / the Grey King's Hall on Old Wyk. naggas-hill had 0 edges graph-wide.

edges.quote: When the Damphair raised his bony hands
edges.note: Aeron Damphair calls and ritually runs the kingsmoot — silences the moot, recites the liturgy, blesses each claimant, asks 'Who shall be king?' OFFICIATES (performs the rite) is distinct from his existing AGENT_IN (general participation).

edges.quote: The horn he blew was shiny black and twisted
edges.note: Dragonbinder is sounded at the kingsmoot as Euron's spectacle — distinct from the existing WIELDED_IN moqorro-reads (the ADWD voyage sounding).

edges.quote: The man who blew my dragon horn
edges.note: Cragorn is the mongrel hornblower who sounds Dragonbinder at the kingsmoot (drowned-man-01:147-159 describes the blowing + the blood/blisters/smoke); Euron names him 'Cragorn' in the Reaver chapter, where Cragorn dies of charred lungs from sounding the horn. Lights the cragorn node.

edges.quote: I am Gylbert Farwynd, Lord of the Lonely Light
edges.note: Gylbert Farwynd of the Lonely Light is the first claimant to rise at the kingsmoot (his mystical 'land beyond the sunset' claim collapses fast).

edges.quote: I am Erik Ironmaker
edges.note: Erik Anvil-Breaker is the second claimant; his claim dies when he cannot rise from his driftwood chair at Asha's challenge.

edges.quote: The Drumm came next, another old man
edges.note: Dunstan Drumm is the third claimant; his speech dwells on ancient Drumm glory and his niggard gifts fail to buy votes.

edges.quote: on his hip rode Red Rain, his famous sword
edges.note: Dunstan Drumm bears the Valyrian-steel greatsword Red Rain at the kingsmoot. Lights the red-rain artifact (0 edges).

edges.quote: Qarl the Maid, Tristifer Botley, and the knight Ser Harras Harlaw
edges.note: Qarl the Maid stands as one of Asha's three champions at the kingsmoot.

edges.quote: Qarl the Maid, Tristifer Botley, and the knight Ser Harras Harlaw
edges.note: Tristifer Botley (Asha's lover) stands as one of her three champions and shouts for her at the moot.

edges.quote: Lord Baelor Blacktyde in his sable cloak stood beside
edges.note: Lord Baelor Blacktyde attends the kingsmoot among the captains and kings and shouts for Asha; Euron later executes him for it.

edges.quote: her favorite uncle
edges.note: Rodrik 'the Reader' Harlaw, Lord of the Ten Towers, is Asha's MATERNAL uncle — brother of her mother Lady Alannys Harlaw. (UNCLE_OF takes no qualifier; the maternal relation is noted here.) Fills rodrik-harlaw core_in=0.

edges.quote: do not sail into this storm
edges.note: The Reader counsels Asha to abandon her hopeless kingsmoot bid ('Your fight is hopeless. Stay, and I shall name you heir to the Ten Towers') — the heart of the Kraken's Daughter chapter. Distinct from his existing ADVISES balon.

edges.quote: shouted Rodrik the Reader
edges.note: Despite counseling against it, the Reader attends the moot and publicly shouts Asha's name ('Victory, and Asha!').

edges.quote: I sent the summons. In your name
edges.note: The Reader convened the kingsmoot in Asha's name and gathered House Harlaw + Stonetree + Volmark behind her claim — the political backing distinct from the kin/counsel edges.

edges.quote: I have taken the Silence on longer voyages than this
edges.note: Euron's flagship the Silence (the red ship with the mouthless iron maiden and the mute crew). CAPTAIN_OF lights silence (0 edges graph-wide).

edges.quote: clambered back up onto his own Iron Victory
edges.note: Victarion's personal flagship the Iron Victory (distinct from his fleet-level CAPTAIN_OF iron-fleet). Lights iron-victory (0 edges).

edges.quote: That horn you heard I found amongst the smoking ruins that were Valyria
edges.note: Euron claims Dragonbinder as his own, found (he says) in the ruins of Valyria. Lights dragonbinder's possession (core_in=0). The Valyria-theft / Joramun=Horn provenance reading stays node-prose, GATED.

edges.quote: a motley crew of mutes and mongrels
edges.note: The Silence is crewed by Euron's mutes and mongrels (his bastard 'mongrel sons'). Lights the 0-edge eurons-mongrel-sons node. Tier-2: the node-identity match between 'mongrel sons' and the 'mutes and mongrels' crew is reasonable but not letter-exact in this line.

edges.quote: Then it was Hotho Harlaw the priest heard, as he filled his hands with gold
edges.note: WHODUNIT/agency done HONESTLY: instead of a type-misfit MANIPULATES->the-kingsmoot-event, the agency is captured at the named-captain level. Euron's mutes spill his plundered gold; Hotho Harlaw fills his hands with it and shouts Euron's name — the mechanical vote-purchase that helps win the driftwood crown. via_bribe (precedent: petyr MANIPULATES nestor via_bribe S148). Tier-2 (the 'manipulation' framing of a willing bribe-taker is interpretive; the gold-for-shout is Tier-1 factual).

edges.quote: the call to kingsmoot, then all was changed
edges.note: The Damphair's summons to kingsmoot is what drives Victarion to abandon Moat Cailin and sail home to contend ('then all was changed... The next day he gave command of Moat Cailin to Ralf Kenning and set off'). MOTIVATES -> character. Tier-2 (borderline — routes Victarion's decision through the event).

edges.quote: He put a baby in her belly and made me do the killing
edges.note: The salt-wife wound at the root of Victarion's hatred of Euron: Euron got Victarion's third wife with child, and Victarion killed her at Balon's command rather than be kinslayer to Euron. The dyadic killing (distinct from the existing victarion-admits-euron-s-role event). Lights the wife node. The seduction/rape ambiguity (Euron's act) stays node-prose; this edge is only Victarion's confirmed killing.

edges.quote: With mine own hands I flung the first torch onto his flagship
edges.note: Cross-arc backstory seam (Greyjoy's Rebellion, 289 AC): Victarion personally executed the burning of the Lannister fleet at Lannisport. Lights the 0-incoming burning-of-the-lannister-fleet event.

edges.quote: The Crow's Eye hatched the scheme
edges.note: Asha credits Euron as the architect of the Lannisport burning ('The Crow's Eye hatched the scheme'), which Victarion bitterly disputes (he flung the torch). Shared-agency: Victarion the executor (E36, Tier-1), Euron the planner (Tier-2). The dispute itself is part of the Euron<->Victarion grievance.
